title: Proposed edit review banner with preview diff and accept/reject controls
purpose: Displays a sticky banner showing Claude's proposed code edit, allowing users to preview the changes in a diff modal and accept or reject the proposal.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ProposedEditReview that accepts props for current code, proposed code, message, timestamp, and handler functions for accept/reject actions. Includes a helper function formatRelativeTime for displaying time deltas.

steps.content: Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp.
IF the difference is less than a minute, return 'just now'.
ELSE IF the difference is less than an hour, return the number of minutes ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a day, return the number of hours ago.
ELSE return the number of days ago.
Initialize state for processing status and preview modal visibility.
Determine if the current code differs from the proposed code.
Set up a callback to handle accepting the proposed edit with processing state management.
Set up a callback to handle rejecting the proposed edit with processing state management.
Add an effect to listen for escape key presses to close the preview modal.
Render the banner with the proposed edit message and action buttons.
IF the preview modal is open, render the diff viewer with current and proposed code.
IF already processing, return early to prevent concurrent actions.
Set the processing state to true.
Call the onAccept prop function to process the acceptance.
Reset the processing state after the operation completes, whether successful or failed.
IF already processing, return early to prevent concurrent actions.
Set the processing state to true.
Call the onReject prop function to process the rejection.
Reset the processing state after the operation completes, whether successful or failed.
Check if the pressed key is the escape key.
IF the escape key is pressed, close the preview modal.
